name: PocketBase realtime behavior
pocketBaseNote: PocketBase realtime subscriptions are scoped by collection topics and must respect the request auth context captured when the client subscribes.

cases.name: realtime connect returns PB_CONNECT
cases.pocketBaseNote: A realtime connection starts with a PB_CONNECT event containing the client id used for subscription requests.

cases.name: invalid realtime client is rejected
cases.pocketBaseNote: Realtime subscription requests with an unknown client id should be rejected.

cases.name: owner realtime subscription is accepted
cases.pocketBaseNote: A valid auth token can subscribe to collection-level record events.

cases.name: record-specific realtime subscription is accepted
cases.pocketBaseNote: Record-specific realtime topics should be accepted for a concrete record id.

cases.name: anonymous realtime subscription is accepted with empty auth context
cases.pocketBaseNote: Anonymous realtime clients can subscribe, but protected record rules evaluate with an empty @request.auth context.

cases.name: owner record create event is delivered to matching subscribers
cases.pocketBaseNote: A created record that matches the subscriber auth context is delivered to collection and record-specific topics.

cases.name: non-matching auth context does not receive realtime event
cases.pocketBaseNote: Records hidden by list/view rules should not be delivered to subscribers with a different auth context.

cases.name: owner record update event is delivered
cases.pocketBaseNote: Updates to visible records are delivered to matching realtime subscriptions.

cases.name: owner record delete event is delivered before removal
cases.pocketBaseNote: Delete events include the deleted record payload and are evaluated before the record is removed.
